title: Create Custom DTP Invoice Object in Salesforce
description:
## Context

A custom Salesforce object is needed to store and report on invoices related to DataTools Pro subscriptions, separate from the generic Invoice object (MBT-668). This object captures Stripe-originated invoice data.

## Object Definition

**Object Name**: DTP Invoice
**Fields**: Invoice date, amount, status, invoice type, Stripe invoice ID
**Relationship**: Many-to-one to Datatools Subscription

## Stripe Integration

The object is populated automatically by capturing the `invoice.created` Stripe event and parsing the invoice data into the DTP Invoice record fields.
acceptance_criteria: DTP Invoice custom object exists in Salesforce with all specified fields
Object has a relationship to the Datatools Subscription object
Stripe invoice.created events are captured and parsed into DTP Invoice records
Stripe Invoice ID field is populated for traceability
Invoice records are reportable in Salesforce
middleware_changes: Logic to capture the Stripe invoice.created event, parse the invoice payload, and create a DTP Invoice record with the extracted fields.
data_model_changes: New DTP Invoice custom object in Salesforce with fields for invoice date, amount, status, invoice type, and Stripe Invoice ID. Relates to the Datatools Subscription object.
implementation_notes: Developer created the object and confirmed ability to capture invoice.created events from Stripe and parse them into DTP Invoice records. This is distinct from the generic Invoice object (MBT-668) which is linked to QuickBooks.
comment_summary: Developer created the DTP Invoice object with fields and demonstrated capturing and parsing the invoice.created Stripe event into the object.
